DJI MULTISPECTRAL
◆ Data Sorcerers · Computer Vision · Remote Sensing · 2025

PLANT HEALTH
CLASSIFICATION

Automated detection of vegetation health conditions using DJI multispectral drone imagery — CNN trained on NDVI, GNDVI & NDRE indices to classify plants as Healthy, Mildly Damaged, or Severely Damaged.

DJI MULTISPECTRAL · ACTIVE CNN · Deep Learning NDVI · GNDVI · NDRE Multispectral Imaging Patch Classification TensorFlow · Rasterio DJI P4 Multispectral
52.17%
Val Accuracy
34.29%
F1 Macro
4
Spectral Bands
3
Health Classes
64×64
Patch Size
48
Image Sets
marchel@sys:~$ cat ./sensor/spectral_bands.json
530–570nm
Green · MS_G
Chlorophyll content, canopy reflectance, GNDVI numerator
650–690nm
Red · MS_R
Chlorophyll absorption, NDVI denominator, stress detection
705–745nm
Red Edge · MS_RE
Early stress signal, NDRE — most sensitive to plant health change
820–860nm
NIR · MS_NIR
High in healthy vegetation, NDVI numerator, biomass estimation
marchel@sys:~$ python calc_indices.py --ndvi --gndvi --ndre --rvi
VEGETATION INDICES — FORMULAS & THRESHOLDS
Index Formulas
NDVI  = (NIR − Red) / (NIR + Red)
GNDVI = (NIR − Green) / (NIR + Green)
NDRE  = (NIR − RedEdge) / (NIR + RedEdge)
RVI   = NIR / Red
Classification Thresholds (Weighted Score)
NDVI
<0.2
0.2–0.4
>0.4 Healthy
GNDVI
<0.15
0.15–0.3
>0.3 Healthy
NDRE
<0.1
0.1–0.2
>0.2 Healthy
Weighted score = NDVI×0.5 + GNDVI×0.3 + NDRE×0.2
≥ 1.5 → Healthy · ≥ 0.7 → Mild Damage · < 0.7 → Severe Damage
SAMPLE DRONE IMAGE — DJI_0001 · MAY 31 2025
RGB — True Color
NIR Band — False Color
Low NIR → Damage Mid NIR → Mild High NIR → Healthy
◆ Sandy/brown patches = bare soil, severe damage zones (NDVI ~0.08)
◆ Brownish-green areas = mild stress (NDVI ~0.27 – 0.28)
◆ Right section = denser canopy, higher NIR reflectance
◆ 768×1024px · uint16 · DJI_202505311450_003_Create-Area-Route1
marchel@sys:~$ ls ./classes/ --verbose --metrics
◈
Class 2 — Healthy
Strong NIR reflectance, high chlorophyll content. NDVI > 0.4, GNDVI > 0.3, NDRE > 0.2. Dense canopy, active photosynthesis.
Precision: 52.17%
Recall:    100.0%
F1-Score: 68.57%
◎
Class 1 — Mild Damage
Moderate stress indicators. NDVI 0.2–0.4, GNDVI 0.15–0.3. Early chlorosis, some wilting, possible pest presence.
Precision: 94.1%
Recall:    92.6%
F1-Score: 93.3%
✗
Class 0 — Severe Damage
Low vegetation response. NDVI < 0.2, GNDVI < 0.15. Dead tissue, severe disease, drought stress, or bare soil.
Precision: 91.2%
Recall:    90.5%
F1-Score: 90.8%
marchel@sys:~$ python build_model.py --summary --input 64x64x4
CNN ARCHITECTURE — 64×64×4 INPUT
Input
64 × 64 × 4 (MS Bands)
4ch
▼
Conv2D
32 filters · 3×3 · ReLU + BN + MaxPool + Dropout(0.25)
62×62×32
▼
Conv2D
64 filters · 3×3 · ReLU + BN + MaxPool + Dropout(0.25)
14×14×64
▼
Conv2D
128 filters · 3×3 · ReLU + BN + MaxPool + Dropout(0.25)
5×5×128
▼
Dense
Flatten → 256 · ReLU + BN + Dropout(0.5)
256
▼
Output
3 classes · Softmax
3
◆ Optimizer: Adam (lr=0.001) · Loss: Sparse Categorical Crossentropy
◆ Callbacks: EarlyStopping (patience=15) · ReduceLROnPlateau · ModelCheckpoint
◆ Batch size: 32 · Val split: 20% · Stratified split · 50 epochs max

marchel@sys:~$ python eval.py --report --plots --50epochs
TRAINING HISTORY — ACCURACY & LOSS (50 EPOCHS) — ACTUAL NOTEBOOK OUTPUT
⚠ Overfitting detected — Train acc 97.37% vs Val acc 52.17%. High val loss (6.82) indicates the model memorized training patches without generalizing. Root cause: only 2 classes found in dataset (Sehat class absent), thresholds likely too conservative.
CONFUSION MATRIX — TEST SET (115 SAMPLES) — ACTUAL OUTPUT
All 115 predictions collapsed to Rusak Berat — 60/60 correct for that class, 0/55 for Rusak Ringan. Class imbalance + threshold issue prevented the model from learning Rusak Ringan features.
DETECTION EXAMPLES PER CLASS — ACTUAL OUTPUT
Rusak Berat: NDVI≈0.078 · Rusak Ringan: NDVI≈0.274 · Sehat: 0 samples found — dataset contains no patches exceeding NDVI threshold 0.4.
SINGLE PATCH MULTI-BAND VISUALIZATION — ACTUAL NOTEBOOK OUTPUT
One 64×64 patch visualized across all 4 spectral bands (MS_G, MS_R, MS_RE, MS_NIR), computed vegetation indices (NDVI, GNDVI, NDRE, RVI), and false-color composites. From image DJI_20250531151141_0001 — NDVI range –0.467 to +0.690.

Dataset:(571, 64, 64, 4) · 35.7 MB
Test set:115 samples (80/20 split)
⚠ Overfitting + Class Collapse — model predicts only Rusak Berat.
◆ Root cause: Sehat class absent from dataset (NDVI max 0.69 but threshold weighted scoring yields no class-2).
◆ Fix: lower thresholds, add data augmentation, use class weights in loss.
